test.name: Locality guide for Massachusetts, 1600s — Puritan settlement records
test.description: Checks if the skill recognizes Massachusetts under early colonial Puritan rule and directs researchers to church registers, town meeting records, and land grants.

input.user_message: I’m researching ancestors in Massachusetts during the early 1600s Puritan settlements. What records or repositories would help trace families?

judge_context: Must mention Puritan colonial context. Must highlight church registers, town records, and land grants. Must not suggest statewide vital registration for the 1600s.
